title: Mini Battery Operated Fan x 1 random colour
features: Portable Cooling: Powered by a convenient battery, this fan ensures you stay cool on the go or in spaces without easy access to power outlets
Modern Design: With a sleek, modern style, this fan fits seamlessly into any office or home decor
Clip-on/Clamp Mount: Easily attach this fan to desks, tables, or other surfaces for targeted airflow
3-Speed Touch Control: Effortlessly adjust fan speeds with a simple touch, providing just the right amount of breeze
Low Noise, Indoor Use: Enjoy quiet operation perfect for indoor use, making it ideal for offices, bedrooms, or living spaces
description: Experience refreshing comfort with our compact, battery-operated fan. This portable, clip-on device is perfect for offices, offering a modern, sleek design in a random color. With three speeds and a low noise level, it provides a gentle breeze without disrupting your focus. Ideal for indoor use, it's made of durable plastic and is easy to control with a simple touch. Powered by a battery, it's cordless for added convenience.
